title: diphyes polyblepharos
intro: Diphyes polyblepharos, also known as the twin-leafed or twin-eyed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Diphyes polyblepharos include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant often involve its leaves, which can be dried, crushed, or infused in hot water to make teas or decoctions for medicinal use.
intro_study: According to "Zhongguo Zhong yao za zhi = Zhongguo zhongyao zazhi = China journal of Chinese materia medica", diphyes polyblepharos, which is also known as Paris polyphylla, has been found to have benefits in treating cancer and diseases related to the respiratory, digestive, and genitourinary systems, due to its 19 active steroidal saponin components.
